title: Vietnam trip event log — Sept 2022
html:
TL;DR

  • A bullet-list event log of the 2022 Vietnam trip — written in the moment, sparse on detail but dense on data points worth re-mining later.
  • Geography hit list: TheinCung Cave (day trip in water), Monkey Island, Poem Mountains, bioluminescent lights at beaches 1–2–3, Ha Giang Loop, sapa (where he got hurt), bus rides Hanoi-area.
  • Misadventures captured: lost debit card, lost bag and everything, slipped and hit head, most depressing lonely bus rides, getting stranded 40km from Hanoi and meeting Vu Van Ba, getting lost with Berko, renting motor bike, eating with Dutch bike-renter, "the square napkins."
  • Reads like a future-trip-write-up scaffold — a person preparing to expand each line into a story later.

Key beats

"Most depressing lonely bus rides."

"Getting stranded 40km from Hanoi and meeting Vu Van Ba."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Confirms vu van ba as a real and named encounter (entity already exists) — Yahir's most-cited Vietnamese local from this trip.
  • The bioluminescent beaches 1, 2, 3 — sequence implies Halong Bay or Cat Ba Island region. Adjacent to 2023 05 13 travel trip log travel-as-spiritual-practice arc.
  • Slipping-and-hitting-head + losing-everything → primary evidence for the voluntary adversity concept (already in concepts/) being grounded in real lived events, not just rhetoric.
  • "Eating with Dutch bike renter" → links to anna dutch entity stub (worth checking for overlap).

Open questions

  • Order of events — which day was the slip-and-head incident?
  • Was the lost debit card ever recovered? Practical follow-up.
  • "Berko" / berkoo — was this the same friend / fellow traveler from the 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream?

Wikilinks
